title: Cam Jipp
html:
Cam Jipp — Yahir's named "partner in crime" from late 2024 through 2025, intended Austin co-mover and Brotein co-builder. By late 2025 / early 2026 the partnership has frayed: Yahir's notes evolve from "my boy I can truly count on" → "result-driven not mission-driven" → no longer the Rankett operating partner (Diddles takes that slot).

What we know

  • First named as partner: Oct 30, 2024: "Cam Jipp is my partner in crime. He's my boy that I can truly count on. Is moving somewhere with Cam Jipp and building the next move?"
  • Austin move plan (May 2025): Cam was supposed to co-sign the lease. Yahir flagged the risk: "the only thing holding him back is his gf of 1 year."
  • August 2025 critique (IRL Lore Tab 7): "He is my best friend but... result driven not mission driven... lacks drive that multiplies, horrible at explaining things, low energy."
  • Sept 2025 arrival (alone in Austin doc): Yahir alone, Cam not there. "I hold slight resentment for him not being here because he doesn't know the effort that you have put into actualizing this move." Drafted ultimatum questions for Cam's November visit.
  • By 2026: Cam doesn't appear in Rankett's operating structure. Diddles is the operating partner instead.
  • Brotein involvement: Cam was on the marketing side; Yahir critiqued execution as "sloppy and low effort."
  • Personal: gf "Talia"; from "Dudley House" in Corvallis.

The arc (5-step)

  1. Oct 2024 = naming as partner-in-crime.
  2. May 2025 = lease-co-sign hesitation (gf, not-thinking-in-reality).
  3. Aug 2025 = harsh internal critique (result not mission).
  4. Sept 2025 = solo-in-Austin resentment + ultimatum prep.
  5. 2026 = quietly absent from Rankett operating structure.

Open questions

  • Did Cam ever move to Austin?
  • Is Cam still on the Brotein team?
  • Real name? "Cam Jipp" is likely a nickname combo (Cam + Jipp).
  • Status of friendship — strained but intact, or actually broken?

  • 2025 08 29 irl lore prd
